description: Letter of appeal signed by al-Naharwani the cantor. The remnants of 7 lines, mostly blessings for the recipient, but also mentioning "terrible illnesses" (pega'im ra'im) and how one ought to extend mercy to Torah scholars. (Join: Amir Ashur)
description_he: מכתב עתירה חתום בידי אל-נהרואני החזן.
